    "pros": "The application demonstrates a clear research vision focused on anticoagulation safety and a distinct career trajectory towards international leadership (g.1.a, g.1.b).     "pros": "The applicant clearly articulates why this award is the right next step, specifically to gain implementation science skills and transition from single-centre to multi-centre work, directly addressing prior reviewer feedback (g.2.a, g.2.b). Partnerships with NHS trusts and international forums (New Mexico) are explicitly planned to expand research networks (g.2.d).",

    "pros": "The applicant has extensive prior experience in population pharmacokinetic modelling (PPM), R, NONMEM, and SPSS, directly relevant to Study 1 (g.3.a). Formal training is evidenced by a PhD in Pharmacokinetics and previous grant leadership (g.3.b).     "pros": "The Plain English Summary demonstrates excellent readability with a Flesch-Kincaid grade of 7.96 and 0% long sentences (secpena__001). The summary strongly emphasizes societal relevance by highlighting the reduction of serious bleeding and death (secpesor__001_c).",
    "drawbacks": "While the summary is highly readable, the lexical overlap with the detailed research plan is moderate (0.148), suggesting some technical nuances in the detailed plan are not fully mirrored in the lay summary, though this is expected for a lay summary."

    "pros": "The application critically analyzes existing evidence, identifying that current APTT monitoring is sub-optimal and weight-based dosing fails to achieve therapeutic range in 50% of patients (secdrp__001_e).
